news.headline: Trump calls Virginia election ‘rigged’ after redistricting referendum
news.summary: Trump’s comments came after the Virginia measure passed by a slim margy of 51.4 in favour and 48.5 against.

news.headline: Sexual violence in the West Bank emerges as tool to intimidate Palestinians
news.summary: Systematic sexual violence and harassment by Israeli soldiers, settlers displacing Palestinians in occupied West Bank.
